code:
import io
import string

fn is_trailing_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
end

fn byte(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b
  when None
    -1
  end
end

let s = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(s)
mut i = 0
mut line_start = 0
mut best_start = -1
mut best_stop = -1

while i <= n
  mut finish = false
  if i == n
    finish = true
  else
    if byte(s, i) == 10
      finish = true
    end
  end
  if finish
    mut stop = i
    mut done = false
    while not done and stop > line_start
      let prev = byte(s, stop - 1)
      if is_trailing_ws(prev)
        stop = stop - 1
      else
        done = true
      end
    end
    if stop > line_start
      best_start = line_start
      best_stop = i
    end
    line_start = i + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if best_start < 0
  println("(none)")
else
  println(string.substring(s, best_start, best_stop))
end
